title: DOOGEE 2025 Newest Android 15 Tablet, Tab E3 Pro 13 Inch Tablet, 32GB+256GB/2TB, Helio G100 Octa-Core Android Tablets, 11000mAh/18W, Large Tablets with SIM Card Slot, 3.5mm Jack/5G WiFi/8+13MP, Gray
features: 【2025 Newest Android 15 Tablet 13 Inch】This 13 inch tablet is powered by the latest Android 15 system, which offers significant improvements over Android 14 in terms of performance and privacy. Performance-wise, Android 15 offers a 20% boost in app launch speed and a 15% increase in overall system smoothness. In terms of privacy, the doogee tablet introduces a new permission management system that allows users to grant app permissions more precisely, enhancing data security.

【MediaTek Helio G100 Octa-Core Gaming Tablet】The tablets 12+ inch android is equipped with the Helio G100 octa-core processor, which includes 2x 2.2GHz Cortex-A76 and 6x 2.0GHz Cortex-A55 cores. Compared to the Helio G99, the G100 demonstrates notable performance enhancements. Whether you're working on office tasks or playing games, the Helio G100 gaming tablet ensures a smooth and lag-free experience.

【Gemini AI Android Tablets 】When combined with Gemini AI, this android tablet becomes even more convenient. Gemini AI can understand natural language, allowing you to interact with it just like you would with a personal assistant. It can help you with more complex tasks, such as using multiple apps together, drafting emails based on your resume, or even creating custom recipes for a dinner party.

【11000mAh Massive Battery + OTG Reverse Charging】Our latest Android 15 tablet 13 inch is a powerhouse with an impressive 11,000mAh battery. This means you can enjoy long-lasting power, perfect for binge-watching your favourite shows or working on the go. With 18W fast charging, you can get up to 50% power in just 40 minutes, ensuring you stay productive without long waits. Plus, the reverse charging feature means you can use your tablet to charge other devices.

【32(8+24)GB RAM + 256GB ROM + 2 TB Expansion】Boasting a massive 32GB of RAM, including 8GB of base memory and an impressive 24GB of expandable memory, this tablet 12 inch android runs on LPDDR4X, which is known for its balance between power efficiency and performance. Coupled with the latest Android 15 system, it significantly boosts the tablet's operating speed. Plus, with 256GB of storage expandable up to 2TB via Micro SD, you can store a vast amount of apps, movies, music, and files without worrying about running out of space.
